channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in the UK
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in the UK — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy — HBO Max Amazon Channel
item.description: HBO Max Amazon Channel · English · ★ 8.0 · Must watch — The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace—eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as…

item.title: Smoking Behind the Supermarket with You — Crunchyroll
item.description: Crunchyroll · Japanese · Just released — verdict soon — Sasaki is an overworked salaryman drifting through the corporate grind, sustained by cigarettes and the cheerful service and smile of Yamada, the clerk at his…

item.title: THE GHOST IN THE SHELL — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · Japanese · ★ 9.1 · Must watch — 2029, a near-future Japan. The full cyborg Motoko Kusanagi envisions a task force that preemptively strikes emerging threats.

item.title: Moana — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 5.5 · Decent one-time watch — Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…

item.title: Saga of Tanya the Evil — Crunchyroll
item.description: Crunchyroll · Japanese · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — On the front lines of the war, Tanya Degurechaff, blond hair, blue eyes, and porcelain white skin, commands her squad with lisping voice.

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.9 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As they transform into Deadites one by one, she comes to discover that the vows she…

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Silo — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: Enola Holmes 3 — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 7.0 · Worth a watch — Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

item.title: The Invite — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.6 · Must watch — Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.

item.title: The Bear — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.1 · Must watch — Carmy, a young fine-dining chef, comes home to Chicago to run his family sandwich shop. As he fights to transform the shop and himself, he works alongside a…

item.title: Supergirl — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.2 · Decent one-time watch — When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an…

item.title: Minions & Monsters — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.3 · Decent one-time watch — This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters…

item.title: House of the Dragon — HBO Max Amazon Channel
item.description: HBO Max Amazon Channel · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: The Furious — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Chinese · ★ 7.5 · Must watch — After a criminal network kidnaps Wang Wei's daughter and the corrupt police refuse to assist him, Wei sets out on his own to locate her.

item.title: Dear You — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Chinese · ★ 9.2 · Must watch — Xiaowei travels to Thailand to find his "billionaire grandfather" who is out of contact due to debt problems, but unexpectedly find the one who has been…
